clues.clue_text: What might be found at the end of a rainbow
Traveled from Syros to Naxos to Mykonos, say
Sold for some quick cash, say
Style that's short on the sides and long in the back
Fatty tuna, at a sushi bar
Almost any word that ends in "-ize"
Keep it up when feeling down
Caribbean nation whose name means "land of high mountains"
"For we walk by ___, not by sight": II Corinthians 5:7
Heavy metal instrument in Verdi's "Il Trovatore"
Elaborate invitation from a senior, maybe
Actress Reneé of "The Sex Lives of College Girls"
Relating to part of the heart
Race that's too close to call
Words traced on a dirty car
Request in billiards or beer pong
It contains all of (and all the letters of) Toronto
Entrances and exits of camp dwellings
Alma mater for Marvel's Tony Stark and DC Comics's Lex Luthor, in brief
Where "The Four Agreements" and "The Five Love Languages" may be shelved
Most merchandise at Ace and True Value
The New York Times's "T," on a phone screen
World capital that's home to the Kon-Tiki Museum
Slang term for a recording studio
Genre for Cypress Hill or the Sugarhill Gang
